commit.message:
Claude/check render deploy wm vt p (#25)

* chore: update frontend package-lock.json after dependency install

https://claude.ai/code/session_0124m6QK27UEjk5h14dUmmbT

* fix: add retry with backoff for backend cold start on Render free tier

Render free-tier services spin down after 15 minutes of inactivity.
The frontend now retries up to 5 times with exponential backoff (3s base)
and shows a "waking up" message instead of immediately showing an error.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0124m6QK27UEjk5h14dUmmbT

* fix: add global exception handler with CORS headers for 500 errors

When an unhandled exception occurs, Starlette's ServerErrorMiddleware
catches it before CORSMiddleware can add headers. The browser then
blocks the response entirely, hiding the real error message.

This adds:
- Global exception handler that includes CORS headers + actual error
  details in the response body, so the browser console shows what failed
- Enhanced /health endpoint with DB connectivity check
- ProxyHeadersMiddleware now activates on RENDER env var (not just DATABASE_URL)

https://claude.ai/code/session_0124m6QK27UEjk5h14dUmmbT

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 3 production bugs found from real user session (uat_y2cqkz5t)

Root cause analysis from production logs — all three bugs confirmed:

## 1. estimate_commute crash (landmarks.py:205)
User asked commute distance 3 times; tool crashed every single time.
User was forced to manually say "do an internet search" to work around
the failure — worst possible UX signal.

Root cause: Rentok API sometimes returns property_lat/property_long as
empty string "". float("") raises ValueError.

Fix: float(prop.get("property_lat") or 0) — `or 0` short-circuits on
empty string, treating it as missing coords, which already has a
graceful "coordinates not available" error path.

## 2. postgres pg_ids type error (db/postgres.py)
Previous fix (json.dumps) was wrong. The booking_messages.pg_ids column
is TEXT[] (Postgres array), not TEXT. asyncpg expects a Python list
but raises on empty list [] because it cannot infer element type.

Fix: pass None (NULL) when pg_ids is empty. asyncpg handles None→NULL
cleanly. Non-empty lists pass through unchanged.
Also removed the json import added by the wrong fix.

## 3. Supervisor classify fails all 3 retries (core/claude.py)
classify() was returning None on nearly every message, forcing fallback
to keyword safety net. Root cause: Haiku occasionally returns a prose
explanation instead of JSON, causing _clean_json("") → json.loads("") →
JSONDecodeError: Expecting value line 1 col 1.

Fix: assistant prefill — add {"role":"assistant","content":"{"} to the
messages list before calling the API. The model is forced to start its
output from "{", making prose responses structurally impossible.
Prepend "{" back onto the extracted continuation before parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix @mention dropdown not responding to taps on mobile

Use onPointerDown instead of onMouseDown to prevent editor focus loss
when tapping mention suggestions. On mobile, mousedown fires after the
browser has already shifted focus away from the editor, causing the
dropdown to disappear before the click event fires. pointerdown fires
at the start of the touch event sequence, preventing this race condition.

Also added onPointerDown to the dropdown container to prevent focus loss
when tapping padding areas between buttons.

fix(ui): show current content in reply preview when target message is edited

When replying to a message, the reply stored a snapshot of the target's
content at reply time. If the target message was later edited, the reply
strip still showed the old pre-edit text. Now looks up the target
message's current effective_text (which respects edits) when rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove GQA expansion from FlashAttention patch

When use_flash_attention=False, attention.py already expands KV heads
via _repeat_kv() BEFORE calling FlashAttention. Our patch should NOT
do GQA expansion - Q, K, V all arrive with same head count.

Changes:
- Remove _expand_kv method entirely
- Remove GQA-related instance variables (num_query_groups, use_gqa, etc.)
- Remove expand_dims and tile ops (not needed)
- Fix output transpose: (2,0,1,3) gives (S,B,N,D) -> reshape to (S,B,H)

Error was double expansion causing BatchMatMul shape mismatch.

commit.message:
fix: corrige cálculo do lucro líquido na simulação de gale do extremos

O net era calculado antes de somar a entrada atual ao accLoss,
inflando os valores exibidos. Movendo accLoss += entry para antes
do cálculo do net, todos os níveis agora mostram o lucro real
(win - todas as entradas acumuladas incluindo a atual).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(gws): install gcloud CLI before gws auth setup

gws auth setup requires the gcloud CLI to be present. Adds install_gcloud()
which registers the Google Cloud apt repo and installs google-cloud-cli,
called automatically at the top of install_gws().

feat: add GitHub CI monitoring, alert rules, and self-audit integration

- Added 3 CI alert rules to config/alert_rules.yaml: ci_pipeline_failure,
  ci_consecutive_failures, ci_monitor_stale
- Added _check_github_ci() to core/self_audit.py so 'python rg.py check'
  now reports CI pipeline status

fix: restore pre-parse shortcode processing via this.parser hook

The tree transformer approach broke all block shortcodes (tabs, notice,
etc.) because they span multiple AST nodes. Restored the pre-parse
approach but using `this.parser` (unified v11) instead of `this.parse`
(which was the wrong API and never fired).
